show.name: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord

next_episode_to_air.name: Chapter 9: Strange Allies

show.overview: After the Clone Wars, Maul plots to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Set after the events of "The Clone Wars," Maul plots to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire. There, he crosses paths with a disillusioned young Jedi Padawan, who could be the apprentice he is seeking, that will aid him in his relentless pursuit for revenge.

episodes.name: Chapter 1: The Dark Revenge
episodes.overview: In the criminal underworld of Janix, Maul enacts a plan to consolidate his power.

episodes.name: Chapter 2: Sinister Schemes
episodes.overview: Maul seeks to enlighten his new prisoners while Lawson pursues him.

episodes.name: Chapter 3: Whispers in the Unknown
episodes.overview: As Maul's plans come together, Devon considers her options.

episodes.name: Chapter 4: Pride and Vengeance
episodes.overview: A confrontation between Lawson and Maul threatens everyone.

episodes.name: Chapter 5: Inquisition
episodes.overview: Captain Lawson faces a sobering new reality.

episodes.name: Chapter 6: Night of the Hunted
episodes.overview: Pushed to their breaking point, our heroes have no choice but to run.

episodes.name: Chapter 7: Call to Oblivion
episodes.overview: As enemies close in, Maul is forced to make a stand.

episodes.name: Chapter 8: The Creeping Fear
episodes.overview: A hasty escape plan proves dangerous, while an isolated Maul regroups.

guest_stars.character: Alien Mechanic / Bully Alien #1 / Bully Alien #2 (voice)
guest_stars.name: Dee Bradley Baker

episodes.name: Chapter 9: Strange Allies
episodes.overview: Trust is tested as newly forged allies navigate the only way out.

episodes.name: Chapter 10: The Dark Lord
episodes.overview: One last test, one last chance to escape and survive.
